Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Lowgold]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Lowgold is the first rank of Gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — Lowgold is a stage of progression.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — The Remnants encountered are from a couple of Lowgolds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — Lowgold is a level of strength or status.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — Lowgold is a stage of advancement above Jade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Lowgold is a level of advancement below Highgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Lowgold is a level within the Gold stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Lowgold is a stage or status associated with Lindon's companion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — Lowgold is a stage of advancement where only one in a thousand reaches Highgold.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Lowgold is a training course level.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — Lowgold is a place Lindon might go.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Lowgolds are a stage or rank.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin displayed skill and control at the Lowgold stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Jai Long intends to kill the Lowgold.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Lowgolds are a stage of power that can move faster than Jade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 4''' — Lowgold is a stage of power held by Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Lowgold is a rank or classification in the combat charts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon used refined Lowgold and Highgold cores to reach Lowgold in his pure core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Lowgold is a position Lindon is qualified to apply for.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 14''' — Lowgold and Highgold are designations used at the Skysworn fairground.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 14''' — Lowgolds are a group of gray-skinned people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Lowgolds are lower-class students among the Skysworn trainees.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 1''' — A Lowgold is a level of power that can be devoured by Enkai's fire in seconds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — The young woman commands Lowgold to hold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — The students sent by the Heralds are Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — The Lowgold is still alive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Ekeri will have two Lowgold assistants to prevent Lindon from running.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — A Lowgold is a type of person Lindon fights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — Lowgold is a stage of power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — The oracle was a Lowgold who was raised to Truegold.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — The squad included three Lowgold students.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Lowgold injured share large tents with dozens of other people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Advancement can help a lifeline.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Mercy spent time trapped at Lowgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Lowgolds are described as having unusual perceptiveness in a crowd.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — The woman Lindon is speaking to is a Lowgold.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin's power loss makes her as weak to Lindon's perception as a Lowgold.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — A girl Lindon meets is a Lowgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — A Lowgold child is from the Wilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Lowgold is a stage or milestone Seisha intends to fix her Path before reaching.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Lowgold is a stage of advancement for Kelsa.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — A Lowgold could potentially open the seventh page of Mercy's Book.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Wei Shi Kelsa is a Lowgold of the Wei clan.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Kelsa identifies as a Lowgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — The contents of the first page of the Book of Eternal Night were made for Lowgolds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Two young Lowgolds were clashing on the stage.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Lowgold is a rank or level below the Abidan middle ranks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Lowgolds were fighting Bloody Thorn.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
